tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
cat /etc/os-release && ip route && ip addr showw
PRETTY_NAME="Ubuntu 24.04.3 LTS"
NAME="Ubuntu"
VERSION_ID="24.04"
VERSION="24.04.3 LTS (Noble Numbat)"
VERSION_CODENAME=noble
ID=ubuntu
ID_LIKE=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://help.ubuntu.com/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/"
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/legal/terms-and-policies/privacy-policy"
UBUNTU_CODENAME=noble
LOGO=ubuntu-logo
default via 192.168.1.1 dev eth0 
192.168.1.0/24 dev eth0 proto kernel scope link src 192.168.1.3 
203.0.113.0/24 dev eth1 proto kernel scope link src 203.0.113.2 
1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/loopback 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd 00:00:00:00:00:00
    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 ::1/128 scope host 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
257: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 02:42:de:21:21:00 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet 192.168.1.3/24 brd 192.168.1.255 scope global eth0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::42:deff:fe21:2100/64 scope link 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
258: eth1: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 02:42:de:21:21:01 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet 203.0.113.2/24 brd 203.0.113.255 scope global eth1
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::42:deff:fe21:2101/64 scope link 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft flush ruleset; nft add table inet filter; nft 'add chain inet filter output { type filter hook output priority 0; policy drop; }'; nft add rule inet filter output oif lo accept; nft add rule inet filter output ct state established,related accept; nft add rule inet filter output oif eth0 ip daddr 192.168.1.0/24 accept; nft add rule inet filter output oif eth1 ip daddr { 7.0.14.1, 203.0.113.1 } tcp dport { 80, 443, 8443 } accept; nft add rule inet filter output oif eth1 udp dport 53 accept; nft list ruleset"}

send_command_to_device
